content: I re-reviewed https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/407 and declined it as a merge target for now. The paste-offset fix clears the earlier blocker, but the PR is still dirty against current trunk and duplicates surfaces already landed via #405 and #409. If there is still unique value left, rebase only that minimal delta onto current `run/microsoft/main` and open a focused follow-up instead.
